notes: Cross-package backend task: Prisma model AIMonitoringEvent added to schema with 8 indexes, MonitoringFlushService drains singletons to DB every 60s, AIMonitoringService queries DB, router rewritten from singleton imports to service calls, container wired. loadAIMonitoringModule and AI_WORKER_COLOCATED retired. Response shapes match frontend MonitoringHealthStatus type. Retention cleanup (30d) built in. Migration SQL created. 48 tests passing (11 flush + 14 service + 23 router).

validation_results.name: TypeScript
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/ai-worker exec tsc --noEmit

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: npx vitest run apps/ai-worker/src/monitoring/__tests__/monitoring-flush.service.test.ts && npx vitest run apps/api/src/services/__tests__/AIMonitoringService.test.ts && npx vitest run apps/api/src/modules/ai-monitoring/__tests__
